g.text: N = 20 puts a node on 32.05 orders and removes
it; the power-of-two N = 32 lets it through

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Rejecting a Tone by Choosing N (McFadden 1987)
